Part.Source:
//tambem tem o Procedimento Primeiraconfiguracao
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod if FilTConCod.IsEmpty() or FilTConCod.IsNull() FilTConCod = 1 &TConCod = 1 commit Else &TConCod = FilTConCod EndIF
Exit EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, TConCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TConCod = &TConCod
Do Case Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon001_CpfCnpjObrigatorio &ValorConfiguracao = TCon001.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.Tcon002_FilialFaturamento &ValorConfiguracao = TCon002.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon003_AvisarEstoque &ValorConfiguracao = TCon003.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon004_BloquearCpfCnpjRepetido &ValorConfiguracao = TCon004.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon005_TipoCliente &ValorConfiguracao = TCon005.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon006_ObrigatorioEndereco &ValorConfiguracao = TCon006.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon007_ImprimirInformacoesNota &ValorConfiguracao = TCon007.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon008_DiasVenceGNRE &ValorConfiguracao = TCon008.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon009_FecharComEstoque &ValorConfiguracao = TCon009.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon010_LiberarCreditoPedido &ValorConfiguracao = TCon010.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon011_MarcarTodosNFe &ValorConfiguracao = TCon011.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon012_TrazerFreteFaturamento &ValorConfiguracao = TCon012.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon014_PlanoAdiantamento &ValorConfiguracao = TCon014.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon015_DuplicadoCompra &ValorConfiguracao = TCon015.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon016_ZerarCancLiberarCredito &ValorConfiguracao = TCon016.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon017_DescMax &ValorConfiguracao = TCon017.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon018_TranspPadraoCidade &ValorConfiguracao = TCon018.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon019_LctoOrcamento &ValorConfiguracao = TCon019.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon020_ClientePadraoVista &ValorConfiguracao = TCon020.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon021_BloquearVendaAreaDiferente &ValorConfiguracao = TCon021.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon022_DestacarDescontoNFE &ValorConfiguracao = TCon022.ToString() //Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon023_UtilizarDescontoGlobalNFe // &ValorConfiguracao = TCon023.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon024_CompradorPadrao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon024.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon025_TranspPadraoCompra &ValorConfiguracao = TCon025.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon026_TipoLctoComissaoEspecial &ValorConfiguracao = TCon026.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon027_PlanoContasFornecedor &ValorConfiguracao = TCon027.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon028_PlanoContaPadraoTransOrigem &ValorConfiguracao = TCon028.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon029_PlanoContasTransfDestino &ValorConfiguracao = TCon029.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon030_LiberaCreditoDataEmissao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon030.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon031_TipoLctoBalanco &ValorConfiguracao = TCon031.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon032_MargemPadraoProduto &ValorConfiguracao = trim(TCon032.ToString()) Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon033_MaiorQtdVendida &ValorConfiguracao = TCon033.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon034_TipoLancamentoAmostra &ValorConfiguracao = TCon034.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon035_TipoLancamentoEntradaProducao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon035.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon036_TipLctoBaixaMateriaPrima &ValorConfiguracao = TCon036.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon037_tipLctoOrdemProducao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon037.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon038_QtdDiasDupVencida &ValorConfiguracao = TCon038.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon039_TipoLancamentoPDV &ValorConfiguracao = TCon039.ToString() // Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon040_CreditoCliente // &ValorConfiguracao = TCon040.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon041_FecharIntergradoFinanceiro &ValorConfiguracao = TCon041.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon042_TrocarTransportadoraPadrao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon042.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon043_DiasMaxPrxLig &ValorConfiguracao = TCon043.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon044_PlanoRecCliente &ValorConfiguracao = TCon044.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon045_ModeloDuplicata &ValorConfiguracao = TCon045.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon046_MostrarEstoqueFiscalFaturamento &ValorConfiguracao = TCon046.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon047_TransOrigemProduto &ValorConfiguracao = TCon047.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon048_TransDestinoProduto &ValorConfiguracao = TCon048.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon049_TipoLctoCancelaProducao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon049.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon050_TipoLctoExtMatPrima &ValorConfiguracao = TCon050.ToString() // Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon051_DiasMaxLctoRetro // &ValorConfiguracao = TCon051.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon052_ServicoDuplicadoVenda &ValorConfiguracao = TCon052.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon053_ProdutoDuplicadoVenda &ValorConfiguracao = TCon053.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon054_TrabalharGrades &ValorConfiguracao = TCon054.ToString() // Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon055_TesteFuncoes // &ValorConfiguracao = TCon055.ToString() // Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon056_AutorizaPrecosPrazos // &ValorConfiguracao = TCon056.ToString() // Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon057_StatusUnico // &ValorConfiguracao = TCon057.Trim() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon058_DigitandoPedido &ValorConfiguracao = TCon058.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon059_StatusANALISADO &ValorConfiguracao = TCon059.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon060_SeparacaoSemCliente &ValorConfiguracao = TCon060.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon061_DadosExpedicao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon061.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon062_TipoPessoaPadrao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon062.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon063_PgtoComVale &ValorConfiguracao = TCon063.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon064_ImpressaoPadraoVenda &ValorConfiguracao = TCon064.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon065_BloquearAlteracaoCodigo &ValorConfiguracao = TCon065.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon066_NaoFecharFinanceiroComDiferenca &ValorConfiguracao = TCon066.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon067_ModeloNFCe &ValorConfiguracao = TCon067.ToString() // Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon068_NaoRetornaCodigo // &ValorConfiguracao = TCon068.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon069_PadraoGerarBoletosNFe &ValorConfiguracao = TCon069.ToString() // Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon072_PagamentoPadrao //Removido Criado o Tcon156 // &ValorConfiguracao = TCon072.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon073_NbsPadraoCte &ValorConfiguracao = TCon073.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon074_DiasCondicional &ValorConfiguracao = TCon074.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon075_ValidaNroDuplicata &ValorConfiguracao = TCon075 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon076_ExibeComissaoCobrador &ValorConfiguracao = TCon076 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon077_ExibeStatusDebitoCliente &ValorConfiguracao = TCon077 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon078_UtilizarCodOrigem &ValorConfiguracao = TCon078 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon079_PalavraDestaquePromocao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon079 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon080_ImprimirMarcaPedidoVenda &ValorConfiguracao = TCon080 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon081_TipoFrete &ValorConfiguracao = TCon081 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon082_DataEmissaoDuplicata &ValorConfiguracao = TCon082 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon083_Markup &ValorConfiguracao = TCon083 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon084_ImpostoAproximado &ValorConfiguracao = TCon084 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon085_ValorPontos &ValorConfiguracao = toFormattedString(TCon085) Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon086_SolicitarClientePDV &ValorConfiguracao = TCon086 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon087_QuantidadeInicial &ValorConfiguracao = TCon087 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon088_QuantidadeReferencia &ValorConfiguracao = TCon088.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon089_ExecutarSonsErro &ValorConfiguracao = TCon089.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon090_EspeciepadraoNfe &ValorConfiguracao = TCon090.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon091_HoraRecibo &ValorConfiguracao = Tcon091.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon092_AutorizaCopiarPedidoFechado &ValorConfiguracao = TCon092.ToString() // Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon093_TipoLancamentoOrdemCarregamento // &ValorConfiguracao = TCon093.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon094_IntegracaoQCT &ValorConfiguracao = TCon094.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon095_ImpressaoAssinatura &ValorConfiguracao = TCon095.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon096_HoraProdutoVendido &ValorConfiguracao = TCon096.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon097_ExibeTipoProduto &ValorConfiguracao = TCon097.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon098_LctoCte &ValorConfiguracao = TCon098.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon099_DownloadAutomatico &ValorConfiguracao = TCon099.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon100_ConferenciaItem &ValorConfiguracao = TCon100.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon101_ImprimirFinanceiroSeparacao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon101.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon102_DestacaVendedorNfe &ValorConfiguracao = TCon102.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon103_AliquotaTribApro &ValorConfiguracao = TCon103.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon104_IntegracaoEfrete &ValorConfiguracao = TCon104 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon105_BloqueiaNaoResolvido &ValorConfiguracao = TCon105 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon106_NaoDestacarGTIN &ValorConfiguracao = TCon106 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon107_PlanoRecCartao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon107 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon108_CasasDecimais &ValorConfiguracao = TCon108 Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon109_SolicitarVendedor &ValorConfiguracao = TCon109.tostring() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon110_SolicitarSenha &ValorConfiguracao = TCon110.tostring() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon111_SomenteComprados &ValorConfiguracao = TCon111.tostring() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon112_ImprimirNomeFantasia &ValorConfiguracao = TCon112.tostring() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon113_TipoLancamentoDevolucaoVenda &ValorConfiguracao = TCon113.tostring() // Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon114_PlanoEntradaCreditoCliente // &ValorConfiguracao = TCon114.Trim() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon115_PlanoSaidaCreditoCliente &ValorConfiguracao = TCon115.Trim() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon116_EnderecoRepetido &ValorConfiguracao = TCon116.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon117_TelefoneEmailRepetido &ValorConfiguracao = TCon117.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon118_ImprimirParcelasSeparacao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon118.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon119_DestacaObrigacaoNFPe &ValorConfiguracao = TCon119.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon120_ValidaCnd_Nfe &ValorConfiguracao = TCon120.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon121_AdicionarObsFinalPedido &ValorConfiguracao = TCon121.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon122_ObsPadraoPedido &ValorConfiguracao = TCon122.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon123_PlanoContasCreditoCliente &ValorConfiguracao = TCon123.Trim() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon124_DataEmissaoPedidoImportarXml &ValorConfiguracao = TCon124.Trim() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon125_AddComplementoProduto &ValorConfiguracao = TCon125.Trim() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon126_ObrigatorioEnderecoPropriedade &ValorConfiguracao = TCon126.Trim() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon127_MotivoPadraoInserirCheque &ValorConfiguracao = TCon127.Trim() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon128_PlanoExtornoCheque &ValorConfiguracao = TCon128.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon129_TotalProdutozerado &ValorConfiguracao = TCon129.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon130_MostrarTabelaPreco &ValorConfiguracao = TCon130.ToString()
Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon131_DescMaxTabPromocao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon131.ToString()
Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon132_MostrarCPFpessoasJuridicas &ValorConfiguracao = TCon132.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon133_BloqPedDebCliente &ValorConfiguracao = TCon133.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon134_ObrigatorioRegimeFiscal &ValorConfiguracao = TCon134.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon135_BloquearColuna &ValorConfiguracao = TCon135.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon136_TipoLctoArracoamento &ValorConfiguracao = TCon136.ToString()
Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon138_TrocarVendedor &ValorConfiguracao = TCon138.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon139_TrocarVendedorPadrao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon139.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon140_AlterarDataFaturamento &ValorConfiguracao = TCon140.ToString() //Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.Tcon141_UnidadeTributavelNotas //&ValorConfiguracao = TCon141.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon142_LiberarAutorizacaoCCe &ValorConfiguracao = TCon142.ToString()
Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon143_PalavraDesconto &ValorConfiguracao = TCon143.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon144_FreteBaseCalculoICMS &ValorConfiguracao = TCon144.ToString() // Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon145_IpiBaseCalculoICMS // &ValorConfiguracao = TCon145.ToString()
Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon146_AberturaPDV &ValorConfiguracao = TCon146.ToString() // Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon147_ExcluirIcmsPisCofins // &ValorConfiguracao = TCon147.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon148_ControleLote &ValorConfiguracao = TCon148.ToString()
// Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon149 // &ValorConfiguracao = TCon148.ToString()
Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon150_BloquearEmissaoOrcamento &ValorConfiguracao = TCon150.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon151_EmiteNfeMesRetroativo &ValorConfiguracao = TCon151.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon152_TrocarTransportadora &ValorConfiguracao = TCon152.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon153_AutorizarPagamento &ValorConfiguracao = TCon153.ToString()
Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon154_NaoGravarDataEmissao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon154.ToString()
Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon155_InciarVendaTipoLcto &ValorConfiguracao = TCon155.ToString()
Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon156_PagamentoPadrao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon156.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon157_SolicitaTecnicoResponsavel &ValorConfiguracao = TCon157.ToString() CAse &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon158_DiasSemVendas &ValorConfiguracao = TCon158.tostring() CAse &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon160_FreteBaseCalculoIPI &ValorConfiguracao = TCon160.tostring() CAse &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon161_MesesAtrazoMedio &ValorConfiguracao = TCon161.tostring() CAse &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon162_EmailEnviarNotas &ValorConfiguracao = TCon162.tostring() //usado nos proce AtualizaNumeroProtocolo Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon163_ImprimirObsOrdemProducao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon163.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon164_DescricaoExtraProdutoEtiqueta &ValorConfiguracao = TCon164.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon165_FaturarComDataEmbalado &ValorConfiguracao = TCon165.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon167_RetornaIndPresenca &ValorConfiguracao = TCon167.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon168_ComponentesFrete &ValorConfiguracao = TCon168.ToString() //Componentes do Frete para CTE Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon169_SempreDestacarImpostosPedido &ValorConfiguracao = TCon169.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon175_GerarDuplicatas &ValorConfiguracao = TCon175.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon178_TecnicoServicoObrigatorio &ValorConfiguracao = TCon178.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon179_MarcarCancelaFinanceiro &ValorConfiguracao = TCon179.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon180_AgrupaGrade &ValorConfiguracao = TCon180.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon181_MsgCondicionalOrcamento &ValorConfiguracao = TCon181.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon182_MostrarFantasia &ValorConfiguracao = TCon182.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon183_PedidoEmbaladoSeparado &ValorConfiguracao = TCon183.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon184_AbrirOrdemProducaoAnteriores &ValorConfiguracao = TCon184.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon185_BloquearColunaVendaaVista &ValorConfiguracao = TCon185.ToString()
CAse &domConfSistema = domConfSistema.TCon193_SomenteOrcamentoVendaTelevendas &ValorConfiguracao = TCon193.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon194_ExigirAutorizacaoFechaCompra &ValorConfiguracao = TCon194.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon195_ObrigatorioResponsavel &ValorConfiguracao = TCon195.ToString()
// Case &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon196_PlacaObrigatorio // &ValorConfiguracao = TCon196.ToString()
Case &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon197_TransOrigemRemessa &ValorConfiguracao = TCon197.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon198_TransDestinoRemessa &ValorConfiguracao = TCon198.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon199_TransOrigemRetorno &ValorConfiguracao = TCon199.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon200_TransDestinoRetorno &ValorConfiguracao = TCon200.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon201_QtdDiaMaximoConsultasTela &ValorConfiguracao = TCon201.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon202_BloqueiaImpressaoOrcamentoSeparacao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon202.ToString() Case &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon203_PadraoVendaPrazoAPP &ValorConfiguracao = TCon203.ToString() CAse &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon204_ConferenciaQtdPacote &ValorConfiguracao = TCon204.ToString() CAse &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon205_DesconsiderarTecnicoComissao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon205.ToString() CAse &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon206_DestacarIbsCbs &ValorConfiguracao = TCon206.ToString() CAse &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon207_CidadePadraoPrestacao &ValorConfiguracao = TCon207.ToString() CAse &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon208_TipoLctPadraoNFSe &ValorConfiguracao = TCon208.ToString() CAse &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon209_ImpostoProdutoCTE &ValorConfiguracao = TCon209.ToString() CAse &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon210_EnviarEmailAutorizadoNFSe &ValorConfiguracao = TCon210.ToString() CAse &domConfSistema = DomConfSistema.TCon211_ControleAceitePagamento &ValorConfiguracao = TCon211.ToString() EndCase
Exit When none New EmpCod = &EmpCod TConCod = 1 TConNom = 'CONFIG.PADRÃO' TCon001 = Status_SimNao.Nao //TCon001_CpfCnpjObrigatorio TCon002 = 0 //Tcon002_FilialFaturamento TCon003 = Status_SimNao.Nao //TCon003_AvisarEstoque TCon004 = Status_SimNao.Nao //TCon004_BloquearCpfCnpjRepetido TCon005 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon006 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon007 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon008 = 3 TCon009 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon010 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon011 = Status_SimNao.Sim TCon012 = Status_SimNao.Sim
TCon014 = '02.07.04' //PLANO ADIANTAMENTO TCon015 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon016 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon017 = 100 TCon018 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon019 = 8 TCon020 = 2 TCon021 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon022 = Status_SimNao.Nao //TCon023 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon024 = 1 TCon025 = 0 TCon026 = 0 TCon027 = '02.01.01' //PAGAMENTO FORNECEDOR TCon028 = '101' //TRANSFERENCIA ORIGEM TCon029 = '102' //TRANSFERENCIA DESTINO TCon030 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon031 = 99 TCon032 = 30 TCon033 = 500000 TCon034 = 1 TCon035 = 53 TCon036 = 11 TCon037 = 51 TCon038 = 1 TCon039 = 2 // TCon040 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon041 = Status_SimNao.sim TCon042 = Status_SimNao.Sim TCon043 = 60 TCon044 = '01.01' //PLANO CONTAS RECEBIMENTO TCon045 = ModeloMontagemDuplicata.Modelopadrao TCon046 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon047 = 70 TCon048 = 7 TCon062 = TipoPessoa.FISICA TCon063 = '01.04' //PLANO PGTO COM VALE] TCon073 = '105011410' TCon075 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon076 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon096 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon098 = 2 TCon123 = '02.06.06' TCon104 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon129 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon131 = 100 TCon163 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon164 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon165 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon167 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon169 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon178 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon180 = Status_SimNao.Nao TCon194 = Status_SimNao.Nao
TCon201 = 730 //dias maximo consulta TCon205 = Status_SimNao.Nao EndNew
commit EndFor
